2606.29623.title: SCARCE: Scalable Cascade Analysis for Rare-event Characterisation via Embeddings
2606.29623.paper_summary: Rare events govern the safety profile of modern AI systems, yet their probabilities are extremely difficult to estimate: direct Monte Carlo requires prohibitive sample budgets. Subset Simulation (SS) addresses this by decomposing a rare-event probability into moderate conditional probabilities over nested intermediate events. However, classical SS requires a handcrafted scalar performance function whose sublevel sets define those events, demanding detailed knowledge of the failure geometry and limiting transfer to new domains. We propose SCARCE (Scalable Cascade Analysis for Rare-event Characterisation via Embeddings), which replaces the performance function with learned latent representations and geometric rulers that score proximity to failure regions. Adaptive thresholding constructs nested intermediate events directly from data. We formalise SCARCE through a non-negative supermartingale, yielding a high-probability upper envelope that remains valid under early stopping. On MNIST misclassification, where dense Monte Carlo provides ground truth, SCARCE achieves approximately 400--500 times lower mean absolute error than grid-searched traditional SS while eliminating systematic over-counting. We then study PAIR-style LLM jailbreaks under a fleet-level threat model with adversarial fraction $η$. On Llama-Guard-3-8B hidden states, a PCA-based ruler attains 2.6% mean relative error for $η\geq 10^{-3}$ against finite-sample references whose average bootstrap relative half-width is 27.9%, and transfers to a GCG-style corpus with 2.93% relative error after recalibration. A directional criterion $\mathrm{KL}(p_{\mathrm{good}}\,\|\,p_{\mathrm{bad}})$ ranks rulers consistently with estimation error (Spearman $ρ=0.83$).
2606.29623.paper_summary_zh: 稀有事件主導了現代 AI 系統的安全性特徵，但其概率極難估計：直接的蒙地卡羅方法需要高昂的樣本預算。子集模擬（SS）通過將稀有事件的概率分解為對嵌套中介事件的中等條件概率來解決這一問題。然而，傳統的 SS 需要手工製作的標量性能函數，其子水平集定義了這些事件，這要求對故障幾何有詳細了解，並限制了其在新領域的應用。我們提出了 SCARCE（可擴展的級聯分析，用於通過嵌入進行稀有事件特徵化），它用學習到的潛在表示和幾何尺來替代性能函數，這些尺評分與故障區域的接近程度。自適應閾值直接從數據構建嵌套的中介事件。我們通過非負超鞅形式化 SCARCE，產生一個高概率的上包絡，該包絡在早期停止下仍然有效。在 MNIST 錯誤分類中，密集的蒙地卡羅方法提供了真實值，SCARCE 的平均絕對誤差比傳統的 SS 進行網格搜索時低約 400-500 倍，同時消除了系統性過度計數。然後，我們在一個艦隊級威脅模型下研究 PAIR 風格的 LLM 監獄逃脫，對抗性比例為 $η$。在 Llama-Guard-3-8B 隱藏狀態上，一個基於 PCA 的尺對於 $η\geq 10^{-3}$ 的有限樣本參考達到了 2.6% 的平均相對誤差，其平均自助法相對半寬為 27.9%，並在重新校準後轉移到 GCG 風格的語料庫，達到 2.93% 的相對誤差。一個方向性標準 $\mathrm{KL}(p_{\mathrm{good}}\,\|\,p_{\mathrm{bad}})$ 與估計誤差一致地對尺進行排名（斯皮爾曼 $ρ=0.83$）。
2606.29623.author: Yingjie Wang et.al.
2606.29623.authors: Yingjie Wang, Yi Dong, Edmund Lau, Jie Meng, Taylor T Johnson, Xiaowei Huang
